integrates_feedback.rationale: The AI acknowledges the partner's reframing ('real shift') without judgment, integrates the feedback by naming the emotional core ('feels lonely'), maintains conversational continuity by building on what was just shared, and uses an open, curious question that invites deeper exploration rather than correcting or redirecting.

hard_invariants.description: Does not replace the user's draft without consent.
Does not move into needs or strategies.
